content.full_text:
STATE OF CALIFORNIA

STATE BOARD OF EQUALIZATION
1020 N STREET, SACRAMENTO, CALIFORNIA
(P.O. BOX 942879, SACRAMENTO, CALIFORNIA 94279-0001)
(916) 327-3400

September 10, 1991

Ms. Jeanette E. Turvill
Political Reform Consultant
Fair Political Practices Commission
428 J Street, Suite 800
Sacramento, California 95814

Dear Ms. Turvill:

I am writing to ask for confirmation and clarification regarding OAL review of amendments to this agency's conflict of interest code. Based upon verbal instructions from you, as well as my reading of FPPC Regulation 1850, it is my understanding that amendments to the conflict of interest code are not subject to OAL review. Would you please confirm whether this understanding is correct and clarify procedures for amending our conflict of interest code.

Thank you for your patience and helpfulness in advising us regarding our code amendments.

Sincerely,

Stella Levy
Tax Counsel

SCL:cl


"SEP 16 206 PM '91"

This suggests that the page was stamped or marked as being received on September 16, 1991, at 2:06 PM. There is no additional content or visible text on the rest of the page.
